known_gaps.description: Source text truncated — only Railway and WAFF Battalion sections survived. ~330 officials missing compared to ~350 expected (1931 had 367, 1933 had 166). Only 18 records extracted.
known_gaps.remediation: Re-OCR from original PDF (ColonialOfficeList1932) to recover full text

known_gaps.description: Jamaica 1958 source file is empty. This was noted during Phase 0 corpus inventory.
known_gaps.note: Not a Sierra Leone issue — listed here for cross-reference only

format_changes.description: Colonial Office List changed format after 1951. Post-1951 editions list only department heads and senior officials, not full civil establishments. No salary data published for most positions. Record counts drop from ~300 (1951) to 38-67 (1952-1959).
format_changes.note: This is NOT a parsing error — the publication itself changed scope. Pre-1952 and post-1952 data are not directly comparable for headcount analysis.
